script.title: Inicializar datos cliente
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */
$user_id = $data["_request"]["user_id"];
$usr_data = $api->users()->getUserById($user_id);

$usr_name = $usr_data['firstname'] . ' ' . $usr_data['lastname'];
$especialidad = isset($usr_data['meta']['especialidad'][0]) ? $usr_data['meta']['especialidad'][0] : 'No definida';
$today = date('Y-m-d');


$url = 'http://hachigamitest.ddns.net:3000/v1/retrieveData?docType=';
//check if data[nit] exists
if (isset($data['nit']) && !empty($data['nit'])) {
    //if nit = 9 digits, then set docType to CC
    if (preg_match('/^\d{9}$/', $data['nit'])) {
        $url .= 'CC&docNumber=' . $data['nit'];
    }

    $url .= 'CC&docNumber=' . $data['nit'];
    
    $curl = curl_init();

    curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
    CURLOPT_URL => $url,
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
    CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
        'Authorization: Basic aW50ZWdyYXRvcjpQYXNzMjAyNSE='
    ),
    ));

    $response = curl_exec($curl);
}
 


return [
    'frm_pais' => 'Colombia',
    'frm_intermediario' => $usr_name,
    'frm_fecha_cotizacion' => $today,
    'Solicitud_areaResponsable' => $especialidad,
    'frm_caseUnderwriting' => 'NO',
    'frm_riesgoElegible' => 'SI',
    'frm_sancionesComerciales' => 'NO',
    'frm_clearance' => 'SI',
    'respuesta_Servicio' => isset($response) ? $response : null,
];

return $json;

    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS     => json_encode($payload),
      CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);

$res = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);

$response = json_decode($res,true);
$json = $response['access'];

return $json;

script.title: Obtener cliente Tia
script.code:
<?php
$url = 'https://68.155.90.178/api/token/party/api/';
$url = $url.  $_request['id_cliente'];
echo $url;
$curl = curl_init($url);


curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
      CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);

$res = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);

$response = json_decode($res,true);

$json = $response['access_token'];

return $json;

Fecha fuera del rango permitido

La fecha de inicio de vigencia debe ser igual a hoy ({{frm_cot_fecha_inicio_vigencia_minima}})

o encontrarse dentro de los próximos 30 días ({{frm_cot_fecha_inicio_vigencia_maxima}})

Por favor, revise la información e intente nuevamente.

computed.name: loop siniestralidad
Calcula el total del grid de siniestralidad
Suma total de columna de Numero de Siniestros
grd_siniestTotal_numSiniestros
Fila 1
computed.formula: return Number(this.grd_siniest_valorReserva_1 || 0) + Number(this.grd_siniest_gastosDefensa_1 || 0) + Number(this.grd_siniest_valorPagado_1 || 0);

computed.name: Fila 2
computed.formula: return Number(this.grd_siniest_valorReserva_2 || 0) + Number(this.grd_siniest_gastosDefensa_2 || 0) + Number(this.grd_siniest_valorPagado_2 || 0);

computed.name: Fila 3
Fila 4
Fila 5
Suma total de columna de Valor de la Reserva
Suma total de columna de Gastos de defensa
Suma total de columna del Valor Pagado
Suma total de columna del valor incurrido
Fila 5
El total siniestralidad incurrida es el total incurrido (celdaG17).
computed.formula: return this.grd_sumTotal_TotalIncurrido;

computed.name: frm_valorRC_cantidadSiniestros
computed.formula: return this.grd_sumTotal_numSiniestros

computed.name: frm_valorRC_lossRatio
computed.formula: return Number(this.frm_valorRC_totalSiniestIncurrida) / Number(this.frm_valorRC_sumaPrima) * 100;

computed.name: frm_valorRC_aniosSiniestros
control_siniestralidad_minimo

config.label: Texto de marcador de posición
config.helper: El marcador de posición es lo que se muestra en el campo cuando aún no se proporciona ningún valor

config.label: Texto auxiliar
config.helper: El texto de ayuda está destinado a proporcionar orientación adicional sobre el valor del campo

config.helper: El valor predeterminado se rellena previamente con los datos existentes de la solicitud. Esta característica le permitirá modificar el valor que se muestra cuando se carga la pantalla si es necesario.

script.title: Obtener Token Tia
script.code:
<?php

$curl = curl_init('https://68.155.90.178/api/token/party/api/token');

$payload = [
    "username" => "create_party",
    "password" => "create_party"
];

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_POST           => true,
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS     => json_encode($payload),
      CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);

$res = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);

$response = json_decode($res,true);

$json = $response['access_token'];

return[
    'access_token' => $json
];

scripts.title: DocuSign Get Tokens
scripts.code:
<?php
$docusignServer = getenv('docusign_server');
$integrationKey = getenv('docusign_integration_key');
$secretKey = getenv('docusign_secret_key');
$code = $data['code'];
$authorization = base64_encode("{$integrationKey}:{$secretKey}");

$curl = curl_init();
curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignServer}/oauth/token",
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => "code={$code}&grant_type=authorization_code",
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    "Authorization: Basic {$authorization}",
    'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded'
  ),
));
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

$docusign = json_decode($response, true);

// Get DocuSign User Account information
$curl = curl_init();
curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignServer}/oauth/userinfo",
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Authorization: Bearer ' . $docusign['access_token'],
    'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
  ),
));
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);
$userInfo = json_decode($response, true);
$docusign['user'] = $userInfo;

return compact('docusign');

scripts.title: DocuSignSendTemplate
scripts.code:
<?php

$config = $data['_parent']['config'];
// Parameters
$templateId = mustache($config['templateId'], $data);
$waitCompleted = getValue($config, 'waitCompleted', false);
$configRoles = getValue($config, 'templateRoles', []);
$outputVariable = $config['outputVariable'] ?? '';

// Set Recipient Information
$templateRoles = [];
foreach ($configRoles as $role) {
    switch ($role['type']) {
        case 'user':
            $user = $api->users()->getUserById($role['selectedRecipientId']);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user->getEmail(),
                'name' => $user->getFullname(),
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'userId':
            $user = evaluateUserIdExpression($role['userIdExpression'], $data);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user['email'],
                'name' => $user['fullname'],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'requester':
            $request = $api->processRequests()->getProcessRequestById($data['_parent']['request_id']);
            $user = $api->users()->getUserById($request->getUserId());
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user->getEmail(),
                'name' => $user->getFullname(),
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'manager':
            $manager = getProcessManager($data['_parent']['request_id']);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $manager['email'],
                'name' => $manager['fullname'],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'email':
            $expressions = [
                $role['email'],
                $role['name'],
            ];
            $mustacheEvaluatedData = evaluateMustacheExpressions($expressions, $data);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $mustacheEvaluatedData[$role['email']],
                'name' => $mustacheEvaluatedData[$role['name']],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
    }
}

// Access information
$appUrl = getenv('APP_URL');
$accessToken = getValue($data, 'docusign.access_token', getenv('docusign_access_token'));
if ($accessToken === null) {
    $accessToken = getGlobalAccessToken();
}
$docusignUser = getValue($data, 'docusign.user', json_decode(getenv('docusign_userinfo') ?: '{}', true));
if (empty($accessToken) || empty($docusignUser)) {
    throw new Exception('Missing authorization codes. Before you can make any API calls you must authorize Docusign');
}
$docusignUri = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['base_uri'] ?: 'https://demo.docusign.net';
$accountId = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['account_id'];

$body = [
    'templateId' => $templateId,
    'templateRoles' => $templateRoles,
    'status' => 'sent',
];

// Add event callback
if ($waitCompleted) {
    $requestId = $data['_request']['id'];
    $key = md5("pm4{$requestId}docusign");
    $callbackUrl = "{$appUrl}/docusign/event/{$key}/{$requestId}";
    $body['eventNotification'] = [
        'url' => $callbackUrl,
        'loggingEnabled' => true,
        'requireAcknowledgment' => true,
        'envelopeEvents' => [
            [
                'envelopeEventStatusCode' => 'Completed',
                'includeDocuments' => false,
            ],
        ],
    ];
} else {
    $callbackUrl = null;
}

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignUri}/restapi/v2.1/accounts/{$accountId}/envelopes",
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
    CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Accept: application/json',
        "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

if ($outputVariable) {
    $response = json_decode($response, true);

    return [$outputVariable => $response, 'callbackUrl' => $callbackUrl];
} else {
    return ['callbackUrl' => $callbackUrl];
}

// Helpers:

function mustache($mustache, $data)
{
    return preg_replace_callback('/\{\{\s*(\w+)s*\}\}/', function ($match) use ($data) {
        return getValue($data, $match[1]);
    }, $mustache);
}

function getValue(array $array, $key, $default = '')
{
    foreach (explode('.', $key) as $segment) {
        if (array_key_exists($segment, $array)) {
            $array = $array[$segment];
        } else {
            return $default;
        }
    }

    return $array;
}

function getGlobalAccessToken()
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/check-token",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return $response ? json_decode($response)->token : null;
}

function getProcessManager($requestId)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/process_manager/{$requestId}",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

function evaluateUserIdExpression($userIdExpression, $data)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    $body = [
        'expression' => $userIdExpression,
        'data' => $data,
    ];
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/user_by_expression",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

function evaluateMustacheExpressions($expressions, $data)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    $body = [
        'expressions' => $expressions,
        'data' => $data,
    ];
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/evaluate_mustache_expressions",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

scripts.title: DocuSignCustomEnvelope
scripts.code:
<?php

// Parameters
$emailSubject = mustache($config['emailSubject'], $data);
$content = mustache($config['content'], $data);
$documentName = mustache($config['documentName'], $data);
$signalId = mustache($config['signalId'], $data);
$recipients = getValue($data, $config['recipients']);
$outputVariable = $config['outputVariable'] ?? '';

// Access information
$apiUrl = getenv('API_HOST');
$accessToken = getValue($data, 'docusign.access_token', getenv('docusign_access_token'));
$docusignUser = getValue($data, 'docusign.user', json_decode(getenv('docusign_userinfo') ?: '{}', true));
if (empty($accessToken) || empty($docusignUser)) {
    throw new Exception('Missing authorization codes. Before you can make any API calls you must authorize Docusign');
}
$docusignUri = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['base_uri'] ?: 'https://demo.docusign.net';
$accountId = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['account_id'];

// Verify $recipients
if (is_array($recipients)) {
    foreach ($recipients as $index => $recipient) {
        if (empty($recipient['recipientId'])) {
            $recipients[$index]['recipientId'] = $index + 1;
        }
        if (empty($recipient['routingOrder'])) {
            $recipients[$index]['routingOrder'] = $index + 1;
        }
    }
} else {
    throw new Exception('Invalid recipients');
}

$body = [
    'emailSubject' => $emailSubject,
    'documents' => [
        [
            'documentBase64' => base64_encode($content),
            'name' => $documentName,
            'fileExtension' => 'html',
            'documentId' => '1',
        ],
    ],
    'recipients' => [
        'signers' => $recipients,
    ],
    'status' => 'sent',
];
if ($signalId) {
    $body['eventNotification'] = [
        'url' => "{$apiUrl}/docusign/event/{$signalId}",
        'loggingEnabled' => true,
        'requireAcknowledgment' => true,
        'envelopeEvents' => [
            [
                'envelopeEventStatusCode' => 'Completed',
                'includeDocuments' => false,
            ],
        ],
    ];
}

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignUri}/restapi/v2.1/accounts/{$accountId}/envelopes",
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
    CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Accept: application/json',
        "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

if ($outputVariable) {
    $response = json_decode($response, true);

    return [$outputVariable => $response];
} else {
    return [];
}

// Helpers:

function mustache($mustache, $data)
{
    return preg_replace_callback('/\{\{\s*(\w+)s*\}\}/', function ($match) use ($data) {
        return getValue($data, $match[1]);
    }, $mustache);
}

function getValue(array $array, $key, $default = '')
{
    foreach (explode('.', $key) as $segment) {
        if (array_key_exists($segment, $array)) {
            $array = $array[$segment];
        } else {
            return $default;
        }
    }

    return $array;
}

scripts.title: AP WIZARD - Execute Template Configuration
scripts.code:
<?php 

$guzzleClient = new \GuzzleHttp\Client(['base_uri'=> $_SERVER['HOST_URL'],'verify' => false]);
$guzzleOptions['headers']['Accept'] = 'application/json';
$guzzleOptions['headers']['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' . getenv('API_TOKEN');
$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/guided-template';

try {
    $guidedTemplateId = $guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
    $collectionId     = json_decode($guidedTemplateId->getBody()->getContents());
} catch (\Throwable $th) {
    return [
        'errorCode' => $th->getCode(),
        'errorMessage' => $th->getMessage()
    ];
}
$recordInfo['userGroups'] = $data['userGroups'];
$recordInfo['glCollection'] = $data['glCollection'];
$recordInfo['assignedEmail'] = $data['assignedEmail'];
$collectionIdEmail = $data['emailCollectionId'];
$process_launchpad_id = $data['process_launchpad_id'];
$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/processes/' . $process_launchpad_id;
$res = $guzzleClient->request("GET", $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
$process = json_decode($res->getBody(), true);
$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/' . $collectionId . '/records';
if (isset( $process['properties']['helperProcessRequestId'])) {
    $helperProcessRequestId = $process['properties']['helperProcessRequestId'];
    $guzzleApi .= '?pmql=data.helperProcessRequestId%20=%20%22' . $helperProcessRequestId . '%22';
    
    try {
        $res = $guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
        $existingRecordRes = json_decode($res->getBody(), true)["data"];
        $existingRecordID = $existingRecordRes[0]["id"];
        $recordInfo['helperProcessRequestId'] = $helperProcessRequestId;
        $guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/' . $collectionId . '/records/' . $existingRecordID; 
        $guzzleMethod = "PUT";
    } catch (\Throwable $th) {
        return [
            'errorCode' => $th->getCode(),
            'errorMessage' => $th->getMessage()
        ];
    }
} else {
    $recordInfo['helperProcessRequestId'] = $data["_request"]["id"];
    $guzzleMethod = "POST";
}
$guzzleOptions['json'] = $recordInfo;

try {
    $res = $guzzleClient->request($guzzleMethod, $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
} catch (\Throwable $th) {
    return [
        'errorCode' => $th->getCode(),
        'errorMessage' => $th->getMessage()
    ];
}

if ($res->getStatusCode() == 201 || $res->getStatusCode() == 204) { 
    return [
        "setupComplete" => "yes",
        "helperProcessRequestId" => $recordInfo['helperProcessRequestId'],
        "emailCollectionId" => $collectionIdEmail
    ];
}

scripts.title: COL - FF - Inicializar datos cliente
scripts.code:
<?php
/*
 * ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor
 * - $data: request/process data
 * - $api: SDK
 */

$user_id  = $data["_request"]["user_id"] ?? 1;
$usr_data = $api->users()->getUserById($user_id);

$usr_name      = trim(($usr_data['firstname'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($usr_data['lastname'] ?? ''));
$especialidad  = isset($usr_data['meta']['especialidad'][0]) ? $usr_data['meta']['especialidad'][0] : 'No definida';
$today         = date('Y-m-d');

$CATALOGO_ID   = getenv('ID_CATALOGO_CONFIGURACION');//28;
$CODIGO        = "NUMERO_COTIZACION";

// 1) Buscar el registro del catálogo 28 por código
$collectionsApi = $api->collections();

$pmql = 'data.frm_codigo = "' . $CODIGO . '"';
$resp = $collectionsApi->getRecords($CATALOGO_ID, $pmql);
$rows = $resp->getData();

if (empty($rows)) {
    // Si no existe el registro, falla explícitamente (o puedes decidir crearlo si tu API lo permite)
    throw new Exception("No existe el código {$CODIGO} en el catálogo {$CATALOGO_ID}.");
}

// Tomamos el primer match
$record    = $rows[0];
$recordId  = $record['id'] ?? null;
$recordData = $record['data'] ?? [];

if (!$recordId) {
    throw new Exception("No se pudo obtener el ID del registro del catálogo {$CATALOGO_ID}.");
}

// 2) Leer valor actual, sumarle 1
$valorActual = (int)($recordData['frm_valor'] ?? 0);
$nuevoValor  = $valorActual + 1;

// 3) Guardar el nuevo valor en el catálogo (actualiza el MISMO registro)
$recordData['frm_valor'] = (string)$nuevoValor;

// Nota: según SDK, el método suele ser updateRecord($collectionId, $recordId, $payload)
$collectionsApi->updateRecord($CATALOGO_ID, $recordId, ['data' => $recordData]);

// 4) Usarlo como variable en tu proceso
$numeroCotizacion = $nuevoValor;

$debug = getenv('DEBUG_FLAG');

return [
    'frm_pais' => 'Colombia',
    'frm_sales_support' => $usr_name,
    'frm_fecha_cotizacion' => $today,
    'Solicitud_areaResponsable' => $especialidad,
    'frm_caseUnderwriting' => 'NO',
    'frm_riesgoElegible' => 'SI',
    'frm_sancionesComerciales' => 'NO',
    'frm_clearance' => 'SI',
    'respuesta_Servicio' => isset($response) ? $response : null,
    'frm_respCot_decision' => 'EN PROGRESO',
    'frm_segmento_cotizacion' => 'C. Seguro comercial',
    'frm_tipo_negocio_cotización' => '(Co_mm Mercado Medio)',
    'frm_canal_distribucion' => 'CO009 Other Broker',
    'frm_comision' => '17',
    'frm_moneda' => 'COP',
    'frm_ambito_geografico' => 'COLOMBIA',
    'frm_fast_flow' => 'FAST FLOW',
    'tri_estado_cotizacion' => 'COTIZANDO',
    'ramoSapFinance' => '67',
    'ramoDescripcion' => 'Responsabilidad Civil General',
    'debug_flag' => $debug,
    // <-- Variable resultante
    'frm_gen_num_cotizacion' => 'LRCG-BPM-' . (string)$numeroCotizacion,
    'tri_numero_cotizacion' => $numeroCotizacion,
    'tri_flujo_inicio' => 'FAST FLOW'
];

$url = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");

$path = "/api/token-party/api/token";

$curl = curl_init($url_full);

$password_tia = getenv("PASSWORD_TIA");

$payload = [
    "username" => $username_tia,
    "password" => $password_tia
];


curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_POST           => true,
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,

$res = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);

return $json;
